Region of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace with Microsoft Sentinel enabled.
Display name for the primary executive workbook.

Display name for the threat intelligence workbook.

connectorUiConfig.title: SpyCloud Identity Threat Protection
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The SpyCloud data connector ingests recaptured darknet intelligence from 9 SpyCloud API endpoints into Microsoft Sentinel custom tables via Codeless Connector Framework (CCF). Supported APIs: **Breach Watchlist**, **Breach Catalog**, **Compass**, **SIP**, **Investigations**, **IDLink**, **Exposure**, **CAP**, and **Data Partnership**.

sampleQueries.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize ExposureCount=count() by email_s
| order by ExposureCount desc
| take 25

SpyCloudCompass_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where infected_machine_id_g != ''
| summarize InfectionCount=count() by infected_machine_id_g
| order by InfectionCount desc

SpyCloudIDLink_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize LinkedIdentities=dcount(email_s) by identity_group_s
| where LinkedIdentities > 1
| order by LinkedIdentities desc

dataTypes.name: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated) | where isnotempty(Time)

value: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | summarize LastLog = max(TimeGenerated) | project IsConnected = LastLog > ago(30d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions on the Log Analytics workspace.

customs.name: SpyCloud API Key
customs.description: A valid SpyCloud API key is required. Contact SpyCloud at https://spycloud.com to obtain access.

instructionSteps.description:
Connect SpyCloud to Microsoft Sentinel to ingest recaptured darknet data.

1. Obtain your SpyCloud API key from your SpyCloud portal.
2. Deploy the SpyCloud solution from Content Hub or via the ARM template.
3. Configure the API key in the deployed Function App or Logic App connector.
4. Verify data ingestion in the SpyCloud custom tables.

properties.description: Detects when SpyCloud identifies credentials stolen by infostealer malware from corporate devices. Correlates infected machine IDs with Entra ID device records.
properties.query:
SpyCloudCompass_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where isnotempty(infected_machine_id_g)
| join kind=inner (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceDetail_deviceId_s = tostring(DeviceDetail.deviceId)
) on $left.infected_machine_id_g == $right.DeviceDetail_deviceId_s
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, infected_machine_id_g, source_id_d, severity_d

properties.description: Triggers when SpyCloud detects corporate email credentials exposed in a breach or darknet marketplace. Matches against monitored domain watchlists.
properties.query:
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where isnotempty(email_s) and isnotempty(password_s)
| extend Domain = tostring(split(email_s, '@')[1])
| project TimeGenerated, email_s, Domain, source_id_d, breach_title_s = coalesce(breach_title_s, 'Unknown'), severity_d

properties.description: Alerts when SpyCloud Breach Catalog identifies a new breach affecting the organization's monitored domains. Includes breach metadata and severity classification.
properties.query:
SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where isnotempty(title_s)
| summarize AffectedRecords=sum(num_records_d), arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by id_d
| project TimeGenerated, BreachTitle=title_s, BreachId=id_d, AffectedRecords, spycloud_publish_date_t, confidence_d

properties.description: Detects stolen session cookies from infostealer logs that could enable session hijacking. Correlates SpyCloud cookie data with active user sessions in Entra ID.
properties.query:
SpyCloudCompass_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where isnotempty(cookie_s) or isnotempty(session_token_s)
| extend TargetDomain = extract(@'https?://([^/]+)', 1, target_url_s)
| project TimeGenerated, email_s, TargetDomain, infected_machine_id_g, severity_d

properties.description: Identifies corporate devices infected with infostealer malware based on SpyCloud Compass telemetry. Triggers device isolation and forensic investigation workflows.
properties.query:
SpyCloudCompass_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where isnotempty(infected_machine_id_g)
| summarize CredentialCount=dcount(email_s), StealerFamilies=make_set(malware_family_s) by infected_machine_id_g, infected_path_s
| where CredentialCount > 1
| project infected_machine_id_g, CredentialCount, StealerFamilies, infected_path_s

properties.description: Detects credential theft activity linked to known botnet operations from SpyCloud intelligence. Correlates botnet-sourced credentials with corporate domain identities.
properties.query:
SpyCloudSIP_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| where isnotempty(email_s) and isnotempty(infected_machine_id_g)
| extend Domain = tostring(split(email_s, '@')[1])
| summarize VictimCount=dcount(email_s) by infected_machine_id_g, Domain, malware_family_s
| where VictimCount >= 1
| project infected_machine_id_g, Domain, VictimCount, malware_family_s

SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(90d)
| where isnotempty(email_s)
| join kind=inner (
    _GetWatchlist('SpyCloud_VIP_Users')
    | project SearchKey
) on $left.email_s == $right.SearchKey
| summarize ExposureCount=count(), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email_s
| order by ExposureCount desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Hunt for VIP/executive credentials exposed in breaches by correlating SpyCloud data with a VIP watchlist.

properties.descriptionHtml:
The SpyCloud for Microsoft Sentinel solution provides comprehensive identity threat protection by integrating SpyCloud's recaptured darknet intelligence directly into your security operations workflow.

Key Capabilities

  • 9 API Data Connectors — Breach Watchlist, Breach Catalog, Compass, SIP, Investigations, IDLink, Exposure, CAP, Data Partnership
  • 60+ Analytic Rule Templates — Deployed as templates for selective enablement
  • 14 Automated Response Playbooks — Password reset, session revocation, device isolation, ITSM ticketing, multi-channel notifications
  • 14 Interactive Workbooks — Executive dashboards, SOC operations, exposure analysis, remediation tracking
  • 28 Hunting Queries — Proactive threat hunting across all MITRE ATT&CK tactics
  • Security Copilot Integration — 90+ KQL skills, 35+ API skills, 17 sub-agent investigation capabilities

Learn more about SpyCloud
